text: Hey, quick heads up — the Acme data pipeline credentials are still blocked. I've escalated to their IT team.
Got it. I'll adjust the timeline in the SOW if this isn't resolved by EOD.
David, can you give me an update on your allocation next week? I'm seeing 120% in the forecast.
Yeah I'm overloaded. The Big Retail project is taking more time than estimated. Need help.
